APPEARANCES: Kathryn E. Van Houton, Esq. of Irsfeld, Irsfeld and Younger LLP 818/242-6859 for petitioner & moving party (appearing via CourtCall); no other appearances.

Ntc Of Hearing Of Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-13-2008 Continued To Dec-15-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER AAMCO TRANSMISSIONS, INC.'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award.
APPEARANCES: Kathryn E. Van Houten, Esq. of Irsfeld, Irsfeld & Younger LLP 818/242-6859 for petitioner & moving party (appearing via CourtCall); no other appearances.
RULING: Moving party requested a continuance as petitioner failed to serve one of the defendants, Stanley Wo. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and continued the matter to 12/15/08. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
